title: tui-translator Backpressure Telemetry Schema v1 (QA8-07)
description: Machine-readable contract for the audio-capture / provider / cancellation / virtual-mic backpressure telemetry snapshot emitted by `crate::metrics::backpressure::BackpressureTelemetry::snapshot_json`. Schema v1 is the contract QA8-05 (issue #503) consumes to enforce backpressure thresholds during the 8-hour soak. The snapshot is strictly additive over QA8-03's audio_summary/provider_summary/virtual_mic_summary: those fields remain authoritative for SLO comparisons but lack jitter distribution, provider queue depth, error-recovery counts, cancellation latency, and sink write latency, which this schema fills in. All histogram values are reported in microseconds (`*_us`). The `breaches` array enumerates any threshold that was exceeded at snapshot time; `ok` is `true` iff `breaches` is empty.

schema_version.description: Backpressure-telemetry schema version. v1 is the QA8-07 baseline; subsequent revisions MUST bump this string.

issue.description: DEPRECATED in v1.1+ — use `related_issues` instead. Retained as optional for forward compatibility; readers SHOULD ignore.

related_issues.description: GitHub issues this telemetry is evidence for. Always contains '#505' for QA8-07; QA8-05 (issue #503) may reuse the same telemetry, so this is an array rather than a single value.

sample_index.description: Monotonically-increasing snapshot ordinal so soak readers can order samples without wall-clock dependence.

sample_unix_ms.description: Wall-clock timestamp (ms since UNIX epoch) of the snapshot. May be 0 if the system clock is not available.

breaches.description: Identifiers of any threshold whose value was exceeded at snapshot time. Each identifier is mapped to a threshold-object key via `breach_threshold_map`.

breach_threshold_map.description: Mapping from each breach identifier present in `breaches` to the key under `thresholds` it derives from. Provides a deterministic mapping when names diverge (e.g. `capture_stalls` -> `max_capture_stalls`).

calibration.description: Calibration metadata noting which thresholds are advisory pending a 30-minute soak + QA8-05 evidence loop.

histogram_us.description: HDR-histogram percentile envelope expressed in microseconds.

chunks_seen.description: Total audio chunks delivered into the fanout / pipeline.

stall_count.description: Number of inter-chunk gaps that exceeded `stall_threshold_ns`, plus any explicit `record_stall()` calls.

stall_threshold_ns.description: Configured stall threshold in nanoseconds; gaps strictly greater than this count toward `stall_count`.

recovered_errors.description: Transient (429/503/network) errors that were retried and eventually succeeded.

permanent_errors.description: Errors that exhausted retries or were non-transient (auth, invalid input).

observed.description: Cancelled tasks observed to have exited.

underruns.description: Sink ran out of data before the next write arrived.

fanout_drops.description: Mirror of `FanoutDropCounters` (DM-02, issue #378) summed across slots for QA8-05 convenience.

thresholds.description: Threshold envelope embedded in the snapshot so QA8-05 can flag breaches without re-reading its own config.
